/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libautopilot_interface_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libautopilot_interface_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/autopilot_interface_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/autopilot_interface_msgs/action/detail/land__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/autopilot_interface_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/autopilot_interface_msgs/action/detail/offboard__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/autopilot_interface_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/autopilot_interface_msgs/action/detail/orbit__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/autopilot_interface_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/autopilot_interface_msgs/action/detail/takeoff__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/autopilot_interface_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/autopilot_interface_msgs/msg/detail/offboard_flag__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/autopilot_interface_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/autopilot_interface_msgs/srv/detail/set_speed__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/autopilot_interface_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/autopilot_interface_msgs/srv/detail/set_reposition__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeographic_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libaction_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libunique_identifier_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
